goal: Make returning from the sub-screens back to the initial four-button main menu feel smoother and more natural without rewriting the app navigation structure.
constraints: Keep the existing screen model and core navigation behavior intact.
Prefer a lightweight shared transition or staged handoff over large routing changes.
Do not alter gameplay logic or story content to solve the visual transition issue.
Limit edits to app shell and directly related screen transition components.
deliverables: Inspect how non-battle screens currently return to the main menu.
Implement a smoother shared return-to-menu transition.
Document the transition polish scope in a short audit note.
